ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the customer belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "lot" TEXT /* Lot number of the customer's address */,
  "am_pm" TEXT /* Whether the transaction was made in the AM or PM */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the customer account is active */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_referrer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Street address of the company */,
  "company_city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "company_state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "company_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "am_pm" TEXT /* Whether the transaction was made in the AM or PM */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer during the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_provider" TEXT /* Payment provider (e.g., JCB, Mastercard) */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., 16 digit, 13 digit) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "card_exp_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  "card_security_code" TEXT /* Security code of the credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the payment method belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment method was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether this is the default payment method for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser (e.g., Opera, Chrome) */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used by the browser (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the browser record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the browser record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_browsers" (
  "transaction_browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction-browser link */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser used */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction-browser link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction-browser link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_browsers_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_browsers_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., el, fr) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether this is the default language for the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the language record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_languages" (
  "customer_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-language link */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language preferred by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer-language link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer-language link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_languages_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., US, DE) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default currency for the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_countries" (
  "customer_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-country link */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the customer is from */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer-country link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer-country link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_countries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
